motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def maxScore(self, s: str) -> int:
    n = len(s)
    max_score = 0
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(i+1, n+1):
            score = 0
            for k in range(i, j):
                score += s[k] * (j - k)
            max_score = max(max_score, score)
    return max_score

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n^2)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
